subject: Spiritomb, a ghostly entity formed from swirling green spirit-energy, suspended against a dark cosmic background
description: A spectral creature composed of swirling green luminous energy forms a roughly spherical mass at the center of the frame. Within the swirling vortex, a faint face-like pattern is visible — eyes and a mouth-like expression rendered in the green glow. The background is deep dark blue-black, suggesting a void or cosmic space, with faint purple-toned swirling energy extending outward. The overall effect is eerie and otherworldly, with the green glow as the dominant light source against the surrounding darkness.
foreground: swirling green spectral mass with faint face-like features
background: deep dark void with faint purple-toned swirling energy
